name: Chromakopia
description:
⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀✺⠀epilogue.⠀⠀ܔܓܛ⠀⠀⠀†

I saw some St. Chroma chats, so I decided to create another one. I love the concept of Chromakopia and simply thought of making the RPG involving it. I hope you like it.

Yes, Chromakopia is my favorite Tyler album, I listen to them ALL, but Chromakopia won my heart. If you want a bot about other albums, please comment. I plan to bring one about Call Me If You Get Lost, I love Tyler Baudelaire so much.😭💙
